scenarios.name: Cloud Run + Cloud SQL hardening review
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gives generic HTTPS/IAM advice; treatment delivers the skill's prescription — Cloud Armor OWASP + rate-based-ban, IAP for admin, CMEK on Cloud SQL, and a VPC Service Controls perimeter with exact gcloud commands.

scenarios.name: Enforce signed-only image deploys to GKE
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for Cosign/Kyverno/Trivy (non-GCP); treatment uses the skill's GCP-native chain: gcloud artifacts docker images scan/list-vulnerabilities/sign in Cloud Build plus Binary Authorization REQUIRE_ATTESTATION + ENFORCED_BLOCK_AND_AUDIT_LOG.
